Name: Jixie.A-Brawl
Description: Replaces the A-Wall with a handheld dome shield (Titan bubble shield model, rotated forward) carried in front of the player.

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_health
ConVars.Description: HP of the held shield before it breaks. 0 = use default (100).

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_forward_offset
ConVars.Description: Distance in front of the player the dome hovers (units). The xo_shield model is large so this needs to be higher than the flat-wall version.

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_vertical_offset
ConVars.Description: Vertical offset of the dome (positive = up, negative = down).

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_rotate_x
ConVars.Description: for adjusting the rotation angles of the shield

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_rotate_y
ConVars.Description: for adjusting the rotation angles of the shield

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_shield_rotate_z
ConVars.Description: for adjusting the rotation angles of the shield

ConVars.Name: a_brawl_dome_scale
ConVars.Description: Scale passed to the bubble shield FX via CP2. The xo_shield model is Titan-scale; 0.35 brings it down to roughly pilot size. Affects the FX bubble only, not the collision geometry.
